description_long: This lantern features a cylindrical body with a dark metallic frame and a semi-translucent, smoky glass enclosure. The top is capped with a hexagonal metal roof, and a prominent circular metal ring is attached for hanging. The glass panels are slightly textured, giving the lantern a weathered, vintage appearance. Decorative metal bands wrap around the body, adding both structural support and visual interest. The base is solid and hexagonal, matching the top, and the overall design suggests durability and classic urban styling.
description: A cylindrical lantern with a dark metal frame, smoky textured glass panels, and a large hanging ring. Decorative metal bands and a hexagonal top and base give it a vintage urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular hanging ring, hexagonal roof, and the main glass panel with decorative metal bands.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical shape, the wrapping metal bands, and the thickness of the glass enclosure.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the hanging ring and hexagonal features visible, but less detail on the glass panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuous metal bands and the cylindrical glass body.
